channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: How South Korea's Constitutional Court is deciding on the president's future
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol is putting up a desperate fight for his political life at Seoul’s Constitutional Court after being impeached and arrested for his short-lived imposition of martial law last year.
item.dc:creator: KIM TONG-HYUNG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hamas says it will release more Israeli hostages as planned, apparently resolving ceasefire dispute
item.description: Hamas says it will release the next group of Israeli hostages as planned, apparently resolving a major dispute that threatened the ceasefire in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Gas explosion at Taiwan food court kills 4 and injures 26
item.description: TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — A gas explosion at a department store in Taiwan on Thursday killed four people and injured 26, fire authorities said. The blast occurred at the food court on the 12th floor of the Shin Kong Mitsukoshi department store in Taichung city, the Taichung Fire Bureau said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NATO allies insist Ukraine and Europe must be in peace talks as Trump touts Putin meeting
item.description: Several NATO allies are insisting that Ukraine and Europe must not be cut out of any peace negotiations, after U.S. President Donald Trump signaled that he would hold talks soon with Russian President Vladimir Putin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Elephants trumpet, squeak and flap their ears after their complex move across an Australian city
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Elephants trumpeted, touched trunks and flapped their oversized ears upon reuniting with their herd after a complex, five-day move from an urban Australian zoo to a much larger enclosure.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: A far-right party is heading for its strongest result yet in Germany's election. Here's what to know
item.description: Alternative for Germany appears to be heading for its strongest national election result yet this month and is fielding its first candidate to lead the country.
item.dc:creator: Geir Moulson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: With doors closed to the US, asylum-seekers turn to their Plan B: A new life in Mexico
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — When Angelica Delgado took a one-way flight to Mexico as she fled Cuba in December, she was set on seeking asylum in the United States. But after President Donald Trump effectively slammed the door on asylum-seekers crossing the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MEGAN JANETSKY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Israel threatens 'all hell will break loose' on Hamas in latest Gaza ceasefire crisis
item.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — Israel’s defense minister on Wednesday vowed that “all hell will break loose” on Hamas if it fails to free hostages this weekend as planned, stepping up threats against the militant group as mediators worked to salvage their ceasefire.
item.dc:creator: TIA GOLDENBERG and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A joke petition seeks to help Denmark buy California as Trump eyes Greenland
item.description: Is California for sale? A lighthearted petition to buy the state of California for Denmark prompted more than 200,000 signatures by Wednesday in response to President Donald Trump’s talk about taking control of Greenland, a vast and mineral-rich Arctic island.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump upends US policy on Ukraine and says he and Putin have agreed to begin talks on ending the war
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump upended three years of U.S. policy toward Ukraine on Wednesday, saying that he and Russian leader Vladimir Putin had agreed to begin negotiations on ending the war following a sudden prisoner swap.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, WILL WEISSERT and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steel tariffs could disrupt international bridge expansion
item.description: The steel 2-lane Starr-Camargo International Bridge in Rio Grande City, Texas, is gearing up for an expansion of lanes, however they might not be steel after 25% tariffs were imposed by the Trump administration, the bridge's owner Sam Vale told Border Report on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, WGN 9

item.title: Congolese church leaders meet Rwanda-backed rebels in the east in latest push for peace
item.description: GOMA, Congo (AP) — Congo’s largest church organizations met Wednesday with Rwanda-backed rebels in the country’s east in the latest push for peace and dialogue after weekslong fighting that saw the rebels seize the region’s largest city of Goma.
item.dc:creator: RUTH ALONGA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At least 10 hospitalized in fire at Rio de Janeiro's Carnival costume factory
item.description: RIO DE JANEIRO (AP) — A fire Wednesday at a Rio de Janeiro factory that produces costumes for the city's iconic Carnival left 10 people hospitalized, Rio’s state health department said, casting a shadow over preparations for one of the world’s biggest shows.
item.dc:creator: DIARLEI RODRIGUES and ELÉONORE HUGHES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White House acknowledges disagreement with Jordan over relocating Palestinians
item.description: The White House on Wednesday acknowledged disagreement between President Trump and King Abdullah II of Jordon over Trump's pitch to relocate Palestinians from the Gaza Strip while the U.S. takes over the territory.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Austrian far-right leader's efforts to form a new government collapse
item.description: VIENNA (AP) — Austrian far-right leader Herbert Kickl's efforts to form a coalition government with a conservative party collapsed in mutual recriminations on Wednesday, more than four months after his party won a national election.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANIE LIECHTENSTEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Who is Alexander Vinnik, Russian exchanged for Marc Fogel
item.description: The U.S. is expected to release Russian prisoner Alexander Vinnik, a cryptocurrency kingpin, in exchange for American Marc Fogel, who was freed by Russia earlier this week, the White House confirmed Wednesday. Fogel returned to the U.S. late Tuesday evening in an emotional homecoming.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Thousands in Taiwan and China celebrate the Lantern Festival with high hopes and rice dumplings
item.description: NEW TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — Thousands in Taiwan and China celebrated the Lantern Festival on Wednesday by releasing paper lanterns into the night sky, visiting light installations and snacking on glutinous rice dumplings.
item.dc:creator: SIMINA MISTREANU, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top Trump official Witkoff ‘not sure’ if Fogel exchanged for Russian prisoner
item.description: The Trump official who helped negotiate the release of an American held in prison in Russia for more than three years said in an interview with NewsNation that he wouldn’t comment on whether the U.S. released any Russian prisoners in exchange.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Fogel release a sign of Trump, Putin's 'great friendship': Witkoff
item.description: Trump and Putin had a "great friendship, and I think now it's going to continue," special envoy Steve Witkoff said.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Rubio says American Marc Fogel freed from Russia due to 'strength' of Trump
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Tuesday that Marc Fogel, an American who had been detained in Russia since 2021, was freed because the U.S. has a "strong president.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Freed American hostage Marc Fogel lands in US after years in Russian captivity
item.description: Marc Fogel, an American who had been detained in Russia since 2021, landed in the U.S. on Tuesday after his release from Russia following talks with the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israel amassing troops in and around Gaza ahead of hostage deadline
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu warned that the Gaza ceasefire will end if Hamas does not release the remaining hostages this upcoming weekend.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Jack the Ripper's identity revealed after DNA match, historian says
item.description: A historian believes he has determined Jack the Ripper's identity through a DNA match of a shawl found at the scene of one of his murders.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Israeli cabinet backs Trump’s demand for Hamas to release all hostages by Saturday deadline
item.description: Israel’s security cabinet supports President Trump’s demand that Hamas release all of its hostages by noon on Saturday, an Israeli official told Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he may withhold aid to Jordan, Egypt if they don’t take in Palestinians
item.description: President Trump said Monday he would consider withholding aid to Jordan and Egypt if they do not agree to take in Palestinians as part of a plan for the U.S. to take over and develop the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's taunting of Canada will pay dividends: Bill O'Reilly
item.description: “Those of use who live in the real world — not the ideological, crazy world — we know it’s just hyperbole.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: French girl, 11, found dead near school, murder investigation underway
item.description: Investigators in France have launched a murder investigation after a missing 11-year-old girl was found dead in a wooded area near her school.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Video: Rare ‘Black Demon’ fish spotted alive for first time
item.description: The scary-looking fish is usually found in water depths of 1,500 meters, where little to no sunlight reaches.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, NewsNation

item.title: Rare wildlife spotting caught on camera in Poland
item.description: A wildlife conservation group in Poland was conducting research on beavers when they spotted two rare black wolves on video footage captured in a forest last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump, South Africa in growing row over hotly contested land law, country's deals with US foes
item.description: Trump’s executive order cutting aid and offering refugee status to South Africa’s Afrikaner farmers has caused a stir in the African country after passage of a controversial land bill.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 7.6 magnitude earthquake shakes the Caribbean, some islands urge residents to leave coastlines
item.description: A magnitude-7.6 earthquake shook the Caribbean Sea south of the Cayman Islands Saturday, according to the U.S. Geological Survey. Several islands and countries urged people near the coastline to move inland but authorities in most places later lifted the tsunami alerts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mother, son die from food poisoning at Dominican Republic resort
item.description: A grieving family filed a lawsuit after a mother and son died from food poisoning while vacationing at a Dominican Republic resort.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Unger, NewsNation

item.title: Defaced Holocaust mural finds new home in Rome's Shoah Museum
item.description: Contemporary pop artist aleXsandro Palombo is speaking out after his murals showing Holocaust survivors were defaced multiple times in Italy in apparent acts of antisemitism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: War-torn Lebanon forms its first government in over 2 years to end deadlock
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Lebanon’s new prime minister on Saturday formed the country’s first full-fledged government since 2022.
item.dc:creator: KAREEM CHEHAYEB and ABBY SEWELL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Egypt lobbies against Trump plan to empty Gaza of Palestinians as Israel prepares for it
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Israel says it has begun preparations for the departure of Palestinians from Gaza despite international rejection of President Donald Trump’s plan to empty the territory of its population.
item.dc:creator: SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, WGN 9
